User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the PG Locator application, which can be a tenant, owner, or admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity. This typically corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for authentication and contact.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the application, determining access and permissions. (Enum: 'tenant', 'owner', 'admin')

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

Property.title: Property
Property.description: Represents a PG (Paying Guest) or Hostel property listed by an owner.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Property entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the User who owns this property listing. (Relationship: User 1:N Property)

pgName.description: The official or marketing name of the PG/Hostel property.

city.description: The city where the property is located.

area.description: The specific area or locality within the city where the property is situated.

address.description: The full street address of the property.

rent.description: The monthly rental price for the property.

description.description: A detailed description of the property, including its features and offerings.

amenities.description: A list of amenities available at the property (e.g., 'Wi-Fi', 'AC', 'Food').

roomTypes.description: A list of room types offered within the property (e.g., 'Single Occupancy', 'Double Sharing', 'Triple Sharing').

images.description: An array of Base64 strings or URLs pointing to images of the property.

contactNumber.description: A contact number for inquiries about this specific property.

availableBeds.description: The total number of available beds or spaces in the property.

status.description: The current moderation status of the property listing. ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')

avgRating.description: The average numerical rating of the property.

reviewCount.description: The total number of reviews submitted for this property.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the property listing was created.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a review or rating given by a tenant for a specific property.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

propertyId.description: Reference to the Property being reviewed.

userId.description: Reference to the User who submitted the review.

userName.description: Name of the reviewer for fast display.

rating.description: The numerical rating given to the property (1-5).

comment.description: A textual comment or feedback provided by the user about the property.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the review was created.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique identifier of an administrator.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the property.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique identifier of the review.
